understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete KA59 by solving each level: maneuvering the controllable piece(s) to push a movable block/object onto the goal tile(s) marked with '+', advancing when the engine reports WIN until all levels are cleared.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions (up/down/left/right) move the currently selected piece exactly one grid cell per step (3 pixels), with positions represented as [x,y] pixel coordinates. If a pushable object is directly adjacent in the movement direction and the space beyond is free, it gets pushed one cell along with the mover; otherwise movement is blocked by walls/obstacles. Walls (#) and other objects can prevent moves depending on their collision behavior. Levels can include multiple selectable pieces; control switches by issuing CLICK on the target selectable’s exact [x,y] position from the object list/state. The movement_*_blocked flags are only hints about adjacency and don’t guarantee the move will fail.
